title: Wiki
noArticlesDesc: Create wiki articles from your glossary entities to build a knowledge base for your book.
redLinkHint: Red links = pages that don't exist yet
noContent: This article has no content yet.
generatedNone: All active entities already have wiki articles
selectEntity: Select an entity to create a wiki article
deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete this wiki article and all its revisions.

gen.title: Generate Wiki Articles
gen.description: Render deterministic stubs, or pick a model to generate full articles with AI.

model.label: Model
model.deterministicHint: Builds article skeletons from glossary attributes — no AI, no cost.
model.llmHint: Generates grounded articles with citations via the selected model.

kinds.label: Limit to kinds (optional)
kinds.hint: Leave empty to generate for all entity kinds.

maxSpend.label: Max spend (USD, optional)
maxSpend.hint: Pause the job before it exceeds this estimated cost.

gen.alreadyRunning: A generation job is already running for this book
gen.notIndexed: Build the knowledge graph for this book first
gen.pausedBudget: Paused — spend cap reached. Resume to continue.
gen.regenDescription: Re-generate this article with AI. A human-edited article becomes a suggestion rather than being overwritten.
gen.regenHint: Pick a model to regenerate this article.

badge.blockedHint: AI-generated — blocked from publishing by verification.

flags.blockedNoDetail: The verifier blocked this article but recorded no specific flags.

staleness.banner: Knowledge updates — {{count}} article may be outdated
staleness.banner_other: Knowledge updates — {{count}} articles may be outdated
staleness.title: Knowledge updates
staleness.subtitle: {{count}} article flagged since its sources changed. Nothing regenerates until you choose.
staleness.subtitle_other: {{count}} articles flagged since their sources changed. Nothing regenerates until you choose.
staleness.empty: No outdated articles — everything is up to date with its sources.

suggestions.humanEditedNote: This article has human edits → the AI version becomes a suggestion instead of overwriting.
